# Evidences from hartmannlauterbach/cybermobbing-netzwerk

## Key Evidences Extracted

### GRU and Russian Intelligence Cooperation
- Direct cooperation with Russian intelligence services (GRU, FSB, SVR)
- Tech-sects and psycho-groups for psychological warfare
- Russian AI technology transfer and advanced disinformation systems
- International terror connections and global terrorist integration
- Pan-European network with Russian intelligence support

### AI and Technological Infrastructure
- 2,000+ bot network for streaming manipulation and engagement
- AI-generated musicians as psychological weapons (KI-Musiker als Zersetzungswaffen)
- Content generation using AI for music, videos, and text
- Deepfake technology for influence operations
- Bot detection systems and automated manipulation

### Financial Fraud and Money Laundering
- Extreme financial fraud through streaming manipulation
- Royalty fraud with millions in fraudulent payments
- Money laundering via music industry as vehicle
- "Violence as a Service" commercial destruction services (€5,000-€100,000)
- Cryptocurrency laundering (Bitcoin, Ethereum, Monero)
- Shell companies and offshore structures for tax evasion
- Systematic tax evasion and social security fraud

- Violence as a Service: Commercial targeting and destruction

### Pan-European Operations
- Operations in EVERY European country confirmed
